message:
refactor: simplify Graphviz integration and fix rank layout bug

- Extract addShape/applyPositions helpers to dedupe addBox/addEllipse and layout methods
- Collapse 5 elbow routing branches to 2 (horizontal vs vertical)
- Fix edgeIndexes advancing incorrectly for Graphviz-routed edges
- Fix concurrent getGraphviz() race with Promise caching
- Add newrank=true to DOT output so rank=same constraints work across clusters
- Use Map lookup in generateDot() instead of O(n) find
- Merge two-pass point dedup into single pass
